author: y4rr
content: Mask R-CNN extends Faster R-CNN (#961) with a pixel-level mask head. Deferred from Sprint C.1 per scope decision. Architecture: reuse FasterRcnn backbone+FPN+RPN+ROIAlign, add MaskHead (4x conv + deconv + sigmoid) applied to ROI-pooled features. Reference: torchvision.models.detection.maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn. Depends on #961 being merged.
